title: pelargonium × auriculatum
intro: Pelargonium × auriculatum, also known as Cape Geranium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × auriculatum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throats, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, extracts, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
